title: Element.prototype
description: Useful built-in extensions for the <mark>Element</mark> prototype.

methods.name: function appendTo(target: Element): this
methods.description: Appends the element to the end of the target element.

parameters.name: target
parameters.description: Appended to the end of the target element.

returns.description: Returns the same element instance to allow for method chaining.

methods.name: function prependTo(target: Element): this
methods.description: Appends the element to the beginning of the target element.

parameters.name: target
parameters.description: Appended to the beginning of the target element.

returns.description: Returns the same element instance to allow for method chaining.
